text.title: GCP Network Architecture Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the `spec` artefact produced by gcp-network-architecture, plus valid / invalid / forbidden examples.

example.note: Missing all required fields beyond `slug`; schema rejects on the first missing required key.

list.item: Plain prose / markdown output instead of a JSON object
Placeholder tokens or empty required fields anywhere inside the artefact
Unbounded arrays whose item schema is missing

text.reference: Validator script — exit 0 on pass, 1 on fail.
